creator: junovitch@freebsd.org
text:
Torsten,
Thanks!  Something to keep in mind looking toward the future is that ports must build on all supported releases.  So it's helpful to mention which releases you tested on as well as including the log from one of them.  Portlint output is also helpful.

For reference, Poudriere was good on the following:
9.3-RELEASE-p28      amd64
9.3-RELEASE-p28      i386
10.1-RELEASE-p22     amd64
10.1-RELEASE-p22     i386
10.2-RELEASE-p5      amd64
10.2-RELEASE-p5      i386 
11.0-CURRENT r289912 amd64

My 11.0-CURRENT i386 was in use.

Portlint:
1 false positive regarding the PLIST_FILES additions and 4 false positives that should be fixed in https://svnweb.FreeBSD.org/changeset/ports/400154

1 style that I didn't feel the need to change.
